---
title: "Writing"
format: html
---
## Chase's Journal

[Announcing Chase's Journal - July 1](notes/my-journal.html)

## Notes

A collection of topics in Statistics I'm thinking about.

### Summer 2026

[Why am I Doing the PhD - June 30](notes/my-motivation.html)

### Spring 2026

[Non-uniform Berry-Esseen Bounds - May 3](notes/berry-essen-bounds.html)

[Defense Forecasting and LIL - April 11](notes/forecasting-lil.html)

[Being Honest: Distribution Uniform Hypothesis Tests - April 10](notes/honest-tests.html)

[Laws of Iterated Logarithms - Updated March 30](notes/Loglog.html)

[Taking N(ormal) to infinity - January 25](notes/Asymptotics.html)

### Book & Movie Reviews

[Goodreads](https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/123864011-chase-mathis)

[Letterboxd](https://letterboxd.com/chasemathis/)
